h1.visual_description: All-caps, centered, serif font, tracking/letter-spacing applied. Used as a running header.

h2.visual_description: Small-caps, serif font, used for figure labels and metadata.
h2.example_text: FIGURE 4.2 William Hogarth, Taste in High Life [graphic].

visual_matchers.pattern: Horizontal line spanning column width above small-font text blocks at the bottom of the page.
Italicized text within body paragraphs followed by a slash (/) and capitalization.
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Poetic verse or block quotation integrated into text

visual_matchers.pattern: Small-caps block text below a figure title.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Numerical superscripts in body text corresponding to a numbered list in the footer (Chicago/Oxford style).

layout_info.primary_flow: multi-column (two-column layout with text wrapping around images)
layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Top left/center: Chapter/Section title in all-caps; Top right: Arabic numeral page number.
